description: "Submit a task for the AI agent to work on"
title: "[Agent] "
labels: ["agent-request"]
assignees: []

---

## Task Type
<!-- What kind of task is this? -->
- [ ] Feature Request
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Code Review
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Other

## Description
<!-- Detailed description of what needs to be done -->

## Expected Behavior
<!-- What should the end result look like? -->

## Current Behavior
<!-- What's happening now that's wrong or needs improvement? -->

## Steps to Reproduce (for bugs)
<!-- If this is a bug, how can we reproduce it? -->
1.
2.
3.

## Expected Implementation
<!-- For features: describe the expected implementation approach -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other relevant information, screenshots, examples -->

## Commands to Run
<!-- Optional: specify which agent command to use -->
- [ ] `/implement` - Implement this feature/fix
- [ ] `/fix` - Fix this bug
- [ ] `/triage` - Just classify this issue
- [ ] `/doc` - Generate documentation
- [ ] Other: ____________
